title: Teyvat Weapon Collection
description: Adds weapons from Genshin Impact as custom item models into Minecraft. Compatible with Wynncraft.
body:
[](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/texture-packs/teyvat-weapon-collection) # ❗ Disclaimer **This resource pack is unofficial fanart. Neither I nor this resource pack have any affiliation with HoYoverse (COGNOSPHERE) or Genshin Impact. All rights to the original designs belong to HoYoverse (COGNOSPHERE).** # 📖 About Teyvat Weapon Collection adds Weapons from Genshin Impact to the game as 3D item models, available through renaming certain items. # ⚔️ Weapons ### Spears *(Any Sword)* - Staff of Homa - Primordial Jade Winged Spear - Engulfing Lightning - The Catch - Dragon's Bane - Lithic Spear - Staff of the Scarlet Sands - Skyward Spine - Vortex Vanquisher - Ballad of the Fjords - Crimson Moon's Semblance - Lumidouce Elegy ### Bows - Amos' Bow - Skyward Harp - Hamayumi - Thundering Pulse - End of the Line ### Claymores *(Any Axe)* - Wolf's Gravestone - Redhorn Stonethresher - Favonius Greatsword - Beacon of the Reed Sea - Verdict ### Swords - Mistsplitter Reforged - Primordial Jade Cutter - Toukabou Shigure - Key of Khaj-Nisut - Fleuve Cendre Ferryman - Freedom-Sworn - Absolution ### Catalysts *(Any Crossbow)* - Skyward Atlas - Memory of Dust - Kagura's Verity - Jadefall's Splendor - Tulaytullah's Remembrance - Crane's Echoing Call *This resource pack also works on the Wynncraft server.*
Click here for a list of corresponding weapons ### Spears - Staff of Homa - Hero - Primordial Jade Winged Spear - Zephra Shredder - Engulfing Lightning - Thrundacrack - The Catch - Idol - Dragon's Bane - Ignition - Lithic Spear - Tisaun's Proof - Staff of the Scarlet Sands - Infidel - Skyward Spine - Blade of Purity - Vortex Vanquisher - Guardian - Ballad of the Fjords - Tidebinder - Crimson Moon's Semblance - Apocalypse - Lumidouce Elegy - Gaia ### Bows - Skyward Harp - Freedom - Amos' Bow - Spring - Hamayumi - Cluster - Thundering Pulse - Epoch - End of the Line - Maelstrom ### Claymores - Wolf's Gravestone - Braker - Redhorn Stonethresher - Gert Rock Smashbanger - Favonius Greatsword - Thanos Warhammer - Beacon of the Reed Sea - Helm Splitter - Verdict - Alkatraz ### Swords - Mistsplitter Reforged - Cataclysm - Jadecutter - Weathered - Toukabou Shigure - Grimtrap - Key of Khaj-Nisut - Manna - Fleuve Cendre Ferryman - Sawtooth - Freedom Sworn - Weathered - Absolution - Absolution ### Catalysts - Skyward Atlas - Olympic - Memory of Dust - Sigil of Resistance - Kagura's Verity - Sunstar - Jadefall's Splendor - Toxoplasmosis - Tullaytullah's Remembrance - Narcissist - Crane's Echoing Call - Conference Call
# 🔧 How to use ## Required/recommended mods - Optifine: Required for custom item textures and emissive textures. - CIT Resewn: Required for custom item textures when using fabric. - Continuity: Can optionally be installed for emissive textures on fabric. - RP Renames: Can optionally be installed to see a list of custom names. ## Usage - Drop the .zip file into your resource pack folder. *To open your resource pack folder, go to Resource Packs > Open Pack Folder* ![img](https://i.imgur.com/tivDQZs.png) ![img](https://i.imgur.com/ske8hBn.png) - Enable it in your resource pack window. ![img](https://i.imgur.com/cRgxfGG.png) ### Make sure the "custom items" setting is enabled. *This setting is available under Video Settings > Quality > Custom Items. If you want to have glow-in-the-dark features, enable Emissive Textures in the same window.* ![img](https://i.imgur.com/JxyvMXz.png) ![img](https://i.imgur.com/hQLTllM.png) ![img](https://i.imgur.com/qcexUXP.png) - To remodel an item, rename a compatible weapon in an anvil to its name. ![img](https://i.imgur.com/yBDa3Q0.png) # 📜 Terms of use ## You may: - Use this resource pack on your server. - Use this resource pack in YouTube videos or similar content creation. - Please remember to credit me if this is the case. - Alter this resource pack for private use. ## You may NOT: - Claim ownership over this resource pack or any of its assets. - Redistribute this resource pack or any of its assets, edited or not, without my permission. ## 🌐 My other projects - Annihilating Armory - Cork and Balls - Ray's 3D Mace
